P001.text: When a multi-tenant system lets users span tenants, any user->resource resolver (team, org, workspace) must take tenant_id as an explicit arg — uniqueness scoped to (tenant_id, user_id) means an unscoped LIMIT 1 can return the wrong tenant's row.

P002.text: Service-role reads filtered only by tenant_id silently bypass per-user/per-row RLS; re-impose the intended boundary in app code (ownership check or linkage filter) at both write and read paths.

P003.text: When adding a new export consumed by a route, update every vi.mock() of that module in route tests too — a missing mocked export makes `instanceof X` throw inside catch blocks.

P004.text: Conflicts in an import list are almost always additive — keep both new named imports rather than choosing a side.

P005.text: When resolving a changelog/docs conflict between two sibling migrations, keep both entries in numeric order; don't let the merge drop one.
